pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point for the landscaping business with quick access to key services, booking, and promotions.
primary_functions: Introduce landscaping services, maintenance plans, and seasonal offerings.
Provide prominent calls-to-action for 'Book Now', 'Get a Quote', and 'Build a Custom Package'.
Offer a global search bar to find services like drought-tolerant installations.
Route users quickly to Services, Maintenance Plans, Gallery, Promotions, FAQ, and Contact sections.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Services' in the main navigation
Click on a featured service category card
Click on a featured service card
Click on a featured maintenance plan card
Click on 'Maintenance Plans' promo or CTA
Click on 'Build a Custom Package' CTA
Click on 'Book Now' in the hero section or header
Click on 'View Our Work' CTA
Click on 'Current Promotions' banner
Click on 'FAQ / Help' link in hero or footer callout
Click on 'Contact Us' CTA in a trust/intro section

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Home' in the main header navigation
Clicking the site logo returns to the homepage
Typical external entry point from search engines and shared links

pages.name: Services List
pages.description: Listing and search results page for services such as lawn care, seasonal cleanups, installations, and design.
primary_functions: Display services within a chosen category (e.g., 'Lawn Care & Maintenance') or search results for a query.
Provide filters for service type (e.g., ongoing lawn mowing), property size (e.g., up to 1/4 acre), price range, rating, and features.
Allow sorting by criteria such as customer rating high to low, price, or relevance.
Link to detailed service or plan pages for more information, quote requests, consultations, or cart/booking actions.

incoming_params.description: ServiceCategory.categoryParam value indicating which category to view (e.g., 'all_services', 'lawn_care_maintenance', 'seasonal_cleanups').
Text search query for listing services, e.g., 'drought tolerant front yard installation'.
Service.serviceType filter (e.g., 'ongoing_lawn_mowing', 'one_time_mowing'). Typically updated when user selects a service-type filter.
Yard size filter using YardSizeOption.code (e.g., 'small_up_to_quarter_acre').
Minimum price filter value.
Maximum price filter value (e.g., 120 for ongoing lawn mowing under $120/month).
Minimum average rating filter (e.g., 4 to show '4 stars & up').
Comma-separated list of ServiceFeature.code values to filter by, e.g., 'drought_tolerant_design,lawn_mowing'.
Sort key, such as 'rating_desc' (Customer Rating: High to Low), 'price_asc', or 'relevance'.
Current pagination page index.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a service card or name in the services list or search results.
Click a 'Book Now' button on a service that is bookable online.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Services' in the main header navigation (categoryId=all_services).
Accessible via 'Services' link in the footer (categoryId=all_services).
Linked from homepage featured categories, promotions, and other internal CTAs with category and filter parameters.

pages.name: Maintenance Plans
pages.description: Dedicated listing page for recurring maintenance plans such as residential lawn mowing and leaf removal packages.
primary_functions: Display maintenance plans with tabs or filters for plan types (e.g., residential vs commercial).
Filter plans by maximum monthly price, included features (e.g., lawn mowing, leaf removal), and other options.
Show key attributes like visits per month, coverage details, and starting prices directly in the list.
Link to individual plan detail pages where users can compare plans in depth and select a plan for checkout.

incoming_params.description: MaintenancePlan.planType filter value such as 'residential' or 'commercial'. The header link uses 'residential' by default.
Maximum monthly price filter for maintenance plans (e.g., 150).
Boolean-like string ('true'/'false') indicating the lawn mowing feature filter.
Boolean-like string ('true'/'false') indicating the leaf removal feature filter.
Comma-separated list of ServiceFeature.code values for additional feature filtering.
Sort key for plans (e.g., 'price_asc', 'visits_desc', 'rating_desc').
Current pagination page index for plans.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a maintenance plan name or 'View Details' on the plans listing.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Maintenance Plans' in the main header navigation (planType=residential).
Accessible via 'Maintenance Plans' link in the footer without default parameters.
Linked from homepage or About page CTAs pointing to specific plan types or filtered lists.

pages.name: Service / Plan Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific service or maintenance plan, including features, pricing, ratings, and action forms.
primary_functions: Present detailed information about a service or plan (features, visits per month, property size limits, ratings, and pricing).
Support context-specific actions: Request Monthly Quote, Request Consultation, Add to Cart, or Select Plan.
Provide embedded forms for quote requests and consultations, capturing contact details, addresses, and notes.
For maintenance plans, allow users to choose billing frequency (e.g., monthly) and proceed directly to checkout.

incoming_params.description: Indicates whether the detail view is for a 'service' or 'plan'.
Service.id of the service to display (used when type=service).
MaintenancePlan.id of the plan to display (used when type=plan).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Schedule Service' for a service flagged as bookable online.
Click on 'View Cart' after adding a service or plan to the cart.
Click on 'Go to Checkout' after selecting a maintenance plan and creating an order directly from the current cart.

access_methods.description: Accessed via links from service and plan listings with type and ID parameters.
Linked from Promotions page directly to promoted service details.

pages.name: Booking
pages.description: Self-service booking page for one-time scheduled services such as spring yard cleanups.
primary_functions: Let users choose a service category (e.g., seasonal cleanups) and then select a specific service like 'Spring Yard Cleanup (One-Time)'.
Provide date pickers and time slot selectors to choose an available appointment (e.g., 15th at or after 3:00 PM).
Collect customer details including name, address, ZIP code, phone, email, and preferred payment option (e.g., pay on site).
Confirm and finalize bookings with a clear 'Confirm Booking' or 'Complete Reservation' action.

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected bookable category (ServiceCategory.categoryParam), such as 'seasonal_cleanups'.
Optional preselected Service.id to speed up booking for a specific service.
Optional pre-selected date (YYYY-MM-DD) when deep-linking to a specific day.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Book Now' in the main header navigation.
Deep-linked from service detail or services list with a preselected service for booking.

pages.name: Custom Package Builder
pages.description: Interactive builder for creating custom landscaping packages combining multiple services and frequencies.
primary_functions: Allow users to search and add services such as Lawn Mowing, Hedge Trimming, and Flower Bed Mulching to a package.
Let users set service frequencies (e.g., every 2 weeks, once per month, one-time) for each selected service.
Calculate and display an estimated package total dynamically as services and frequencies change.
Help users configure packages that meet constraints (e.g., exactly 3 services and total between $300 and $400) and move them to the review step.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Review Package' or 'Continue to Summary' after setting up the package.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Packages' link in the main header navigation.
Linked from homepage CTAs encouraging users to build a custom plan.

pages.name: Package Review
pages.description: Summary and confirmation page for a custom landscaping package before saving and proceeding to checkout.
primary_functions: Display a clear summary of the selected services, their frequencies, and the estimated monthly or total cost.
Confirm that the package configuration meets criteria such as number of services and target price range.
Allow users to go back to the builder to adjust services or frequencies if needed.
Provide a 'Save Package' or 'Proceed' action to store the configuration and prepare it for checkout.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Edit Package' or similar link to adjust the configuration.
Click on 'Proceed' after saving and adding the custom package to the cart.

access_methods.description: Reached after user finalizes a package on the Custom Package Builder and submits it for review.
May be opened directly if a package is already in 'ready_for_checkout' state in local storage.

pages.name: Promotions
pages.description: Page listing current special offers, discounts, and promo codes for new and existing customers.
primary_functions: Display available promotions such as '10% off for first-time customers' along with their promo code text (e.g., GREEN10).
Allow users to copy promo codes via a 'Copy Code' button or by manually selecting the code.
Explain basic terms or restrictions for each promotion, such as applicable services or one-time use limits.
Provide links or prompts to relevant services (e.g., Lawn Mowing - One-Time Visit) to encourage applying the promotion.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a 'View Service' link within a promotion that is tied to a specific service.
Click on 'Browse Eligible Services' for a promotion that applies to multiple services.
Click 'Go to Cart' after copying a promo code to apply it.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Promotions' in the main header navigation.
Accessible via 'Promotions' link in the footer.
Can be linked from marketing emails or campaigns directly to active promotions.

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart page summarizing selected services and plans before checkout.
primary_functions: List all services or plans added to the cart, including one-time lawn mowing and other bookable items.
Allow users to remove items, adjust quantities or options when applicable, and review line-item pricing.
Provide a promo code field for entering and applying coupon codes like GREEN10 with immediate total updates.
Offer a clear 'Proceed to Checkout' or 'Continue to Payment' button to move into the checkout flow.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Proceed to Checkout' or 'Continue to Payment' after reviewing the cart.
Click on 'Continue Shopping' link from the cart.

access_methods.description: Accessible via a cart icon or 'Cart' link typically shown in the site header.
Reached after adding an item from service detail or package review and choosing to view the cart.

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Final step where users confirm their selected plan, package, or services and provide payment-related details.
primary_functions: Summarize the selected maintenance plan, custom package, or one-time services and any applied promotions.
Collect necessary billing and contact details (billing address, phone, email) as appropriate for the business.
Let users confirm billing frequency for plans when needed and select a payment option (e.g., pay now vs pay after service, where applicable).
Complete the transaction and show a confirmation or next steps for scheduled services and recurring plans.

incoming_params.description: Order.id for the pending order created from the current cart.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a 'Back to Home' link after successful payment confirmation.

access_methods.description: Accessed from Cart or Service Detail once an order has been created and orderId is available.

pages.name: Gallery
pages.description: Visual gallery of completed landscaping projects to inspire users and showcase capabilities.
primary_functions: Display project thumbnails with filters for space type (e.g., backyard), features (e.g., patio, fire pit), and yard size (e.g., medium 1/4–1/2 acre).
Allow users to scroll through filtered results and select individual projects for more detail.
Highlight diverse project types including backyard patios with fire pits and other landscape designs.
Link to project detail pages where users can favorite a project and request a similar design.

incoming_params.description: Filter for space type (e.g., 'backyard') when browsing projects.
Filter for yard size using YardSizeOption.code (e.g., 'medium_quarter_to_half_acre').
Comma-separated list of ServiceFeature.code values to filter projects (e.g., 'patio,fire_pit').
Sort key for gallery projects (e.g., 'featured_first').
Pagination page index for the gallery.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a project thumbnail or title in the gallery.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Gallery' in the main header navigation.
Accessible via 'Gallery' link in the footer.

pages.name: Project Detail
pages.description: Detail view for a specific gallery project, with imagery, description, and ability to request a similar design.
primary_functions: Show larger images, descriptions, and key details of the selected project, including a visible project ID or reference code.
Let users 'Add to Favorites' or mark the project with a heart icon for easy reference (stored locally for this single user).
Provide a 'Request a Similar Design' or 'Request Quote for This Style' form capturing name, email, ZIP code, and message including the project ID.
Allow users to specify a project type (e.g., Backyard Patio with Fire Pit) when requesting a similar design.

incoming_params.description: Project.id of the project to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Back to Gallery' link on the project detail page.

access_methods.description: Accessed from Gallery by passing the projectId of the selected project.

pages.name: FAQ
pages.description: Help and support hub with searchable frequently asked questions and categorized help topics.
primary_functions: Offer a search bar for users to find help topics by keyword (e.g., 'service area', 'cancellation').
List featured or common questions and link out to detailed FAQ articles.
Provide quick access to topics such as service areas, booking policies, and cancellation rules.
Guide users to further assistance via links to the contact form if answers are not found.

incoming_params.description: Optional search query string used to pre-populate the FAQ search field.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a specific FAQ or help topic from search results or featured list.
Click on a 'Contact us about service areas' suggestion when FAQ does not fully answer the question.
Click on 'Still need help? Contact us' link.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'FAQ / Help' in the main header navigation.
Accessible via 'FAQ' link in the footer.

pages.name: FAQ Article
pages.description: Template page for an individual FAQ or help article such as Service Areas or Cancellation Policy.
primary_functions: Display the full content of a selected FAQ article identified by an articleId (e.g., service_areas or cancellation_policy).
Allow users to scroll through detailed information, such as lists of ZIP codes served or step-by-step cancellation rules.
Provide navigation back to the main FAQ search/results or to related articles.
Encourage follow-up contact by linking to the Contact page if additional clarification is needed.

incoming_params.description: FAQArticle.articleId value specifying which article to load (e.g., 'service_areas', 'cancellation_policy'). Footer links also use this parameter.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Back to FAQs' link at the top or bottom of an article.
Click on 'Contact us about your service area' within the Service Areas article.
Click on generic 'Contact support' link from any FAQ article.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Service Areas' and 'Cancellation Policy' links in the footer using articleId.
Accessed from the FAQ search/results page with a specific articleId.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact form page for questions about service availability, policies, and general inquiries.
primary_functions: Offer a subject dropdown with options such as Service Availability and General Question.
Collect user details including name, email, phone, and a free-text message describing their question (e.g., about ZIP 60610 and cancellation policy).
Submit inquiries to the business and provide on-page confirmation that the message was sent.
Display supplementary contact information such as phone number, business hours, and possibly office address.

incoming_params.description: Optional subject value to preselect in the contact form (e.g., 'service_availability', 'general_question').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Back to FAQ' link after sending a message related to help topics.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'Contact' in the main header navigation.
Accessible via 'Contact Us' link in the footer.
Form submission sends a contact request using the sendContactFormMessage interface and shows confirmation on the same page.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information about the landscaping company, its team, and its service philosophy.
primary_functions: Explain the company's history, mission, and expertise in residential and commercial landscaping.
Highlight service quality indicators such as years in operation, certifications, or customer satisfaction ratings.
Reinforce trust and credibility that support decisions to book services, request quotes, or sign up for maintenance plans.
Provide links back to key functional pages such as Services, Maintenance Plans, Gallery, and Contact.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a 'View Our Services' link within the About page content.
Click on a 'Explore Maintenance Plans' link.
Click on 'See Our Work' call-to-action.
Click on 'Get in Touch' call-to-action.

access_methods.description: Accessible via 'About Us' link in the footer.
Can be linked directly from external sources describing the company.

header_links.description: Homepage with quick links to services, booking, and promotions
Browse all service categories including lawn care, cleanups, and installations
View recurring residential maintenance plans with mowing and leaf removal options
Build a custom landscaping package by combining multiple services
Schedule one-time services such as spring yard cleanups
Browse completed projects like backyard patios with fire pits
View special offers and promo codes for services
Search frequently asked questions and help topics
Contact form for service availability and general questions

footer_links.description: Learn more about the landscaping company
See examples of completed landscaping projects
Current discounts and first-time customer offers
Detailed information about ZIP codes and regions served
Information on how cancellations are handled for bookings
Get in touch with questions or to request information
